name: 14.2 fl oz Stoneware Mug - Spritz™
description: Upgrade your drinkware with this Stoneware Mug from Spritz™. Made of stoneware, this white mug with red handle features a raised heart on the bottom that's revealed as you drink your beverage, making it a fun choice for serving hot chocolate, coffee and more. Plus, it's microwave and dishwasher safe for easy reheating and cleaning.
